markets.question: Will "Undertone" score at least 89 on the Rotten Tomatoes Tomatometer?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the displayed Rotten Tomatoes “All Critics” Tomatometer score for Undertone (2026) is at least equal to the specified number at 10:00 AM ET on March 16, 2026. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If, for any reason, the resolution data is unavailable at this market's specified end time, the resolution source will be checked until the relevant data is available. This market will resolve to “No” if no data is available by March 20, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.
